tree.name: Jamal Shead
tree.tradeDescription: Raptors traded Jalen McDaniels to Sacramento Kings for Davion Mitchell, Jamal Shead, Sasha Vezenkov, and a 2025 second-round pick (POR own, became Alijah Martin #39). Sacramento also received trade exceptions.
tree.note: Drafted #45 by SAC then immediately traded to TOR in the Jalen McDaniels deal.
